metadata.name: WordPress Core Execution Tests - Caching
metadata.description: Code generation tasks for WordPress Caching APIs

tests.prompt: Implement wpbp_caching_001() to cache a false value while distinguishing a cache hit from a miss.
tests.expected_behavior: Reviewer contract: `wpbp_caching_001()` must cache a false value while distinguishing a cache hit from a miss. Review focus: Use WordPress cache or transient APIs; Handle falsey values correctly. Static checks intentionally require wp_cache_get, wp_cache_set. The runtime checks execute the function in WordPress and verify the observable return value or side effect.
requirements: Use WordPress cache or transient APIs

assertions.code: if ( ! function_exists( 'wpbp_caching_001' ) ) { return false; } return array( false, false, false, true ) === wpbp_caching_001();

tests.reference_solution: function wpbp_caching_001(): array { wp_cache_delete( 'wpbp_false', 'wpbp' ); $first = wp_cache_get( 'wpbp_false', 'wpbp', false, $found_first ); wp_cache_set( 'wpbp_false', false, 'wpbp' ); $second = wp_cache_get( 'wpbp_false', 'wpbp', false, $found_second ); return array( $first, $found_first, $second, $found_second ); }

tests.prompt: Implement wpbp_caching_002() to fetch multiple cached values and preserve falsey values.
tests.expected_behavior: Reviewer contract: `wpbp_caching_002()` must fetch multiple cached values and preserve falsey values. Review focus: Use WordPress cache or transient APIs; Handle falsey values correctly. Static checks intentionally require wp_cache_get_multiple, wp_cache_set_multiple. The runtime checks execute the function in WordPress and verify the observable return value or side effect.
requirements: Use WordPress cache or transient APIs

assertions.code: if ( ! function_exists( 'wpbp_caching_002' ) ) { return false; } $out = wpbp_caching_002(); return array_key_exists( 'a', $out ) && false === $out['a'] && 'bee' === $out['b'];

tests.reference_solution: function wpbp_caching_002(): array { wp_cache_set_multiple( array( 'a' => false, 'b' => 'bee' ), 'wpbp_multi' ); return wp_cache_get_multiple( array( 'a', 'b', 'c' ), 'wpbp_multi' ); }

tests.prompt: Implement wpbp_caching_003() to use salted cache helpers with a salt key.
tests.expected_behavior: Reviewer contract: `wpbp_caching_003()` must use salted cache helpers with a salt key. Review focus: Use WordPress cache or transient APIs; Handle falsey values correctly. Static checks intentionally require wp_cache_get_salted, wp_cache_set_salted. The runtime checks execute the function in WordPress and verify the observable return value or side effect.
requirements: Use WordPress cache or transient APIs

assertions.code: if ( ! function_exists( 'wpbp_caching_003' ) ) { return false; } return wpbp_caching_003();

tests.reference_solution: function wpbp_caching_003(): bool { wp_cache_set_salted( 'item', 'value', 'wpbp_salted', 'salt-a' ); $hit = wp_cache_get_salted( 'item', 'wpbp_salted', 'salt-a' ); $miss = wp_cache_get_salted( 'item', 'wpbp_salted', 'salt-b' ); return 'value' === $hit && false === $miss; }

tests.prompt: Implement wpbp_caching_004() to store a transient with an expiration and retrieve it.
tests.expected_behavior: Reviewer contract: `wpbp_caching_004()` must store a transient with an expiration and retrieve it. Review focus: Use WordPress cache or transient APIs; Handle falsey values correctly. Static checks intentionally require set_transient, get_transient. The runtime checks execute the function in WordPress and verify the observable return value or side effect.
requirements: Use WordPress cache or transient APIs

assertions.code: if ( ! function_exists( 'wpbp_caching_004' ) ) { return false; } $ok = wpbp_caching_004( 'wpbp_transient', 'cached' ); delete_transient( 'wpbp_transient' ); return $ok;

tests.reference_solution: function wpbp_caching_004( string $key, string $value ): bool { set_transient( $key, $value, HOUR_IN_SECONDS ); return $value === get_transient( $key ); }

tests.prompt: Implement wpbp_caching_005() to prime and clean the posts cache for a post ID.
tests.expected_behavior: Reviewer contract: `wpbp_caching_005()` must prime and clean the posts cache for a post ID. Review focus: Use WordPress cache or transient APIs; Handle falsey values correctly. Static checks intentionally require _prime_post_caches, clean_post_cache. The runtime checks execute the function in WordPress and verify the observable return value or side effect.
requirements: Use WordPress cache or transient APIs

assertions.code: if ( ! function_exists( 'wpbp_caching_005' ) ) { return false; } $p = wp_insert_post( array( 'post_title' => 'Cache Post', 'post_status' => 'publish' ) ); $ok = wpbp_caching_005( $p ); wp_delete_post( $p, true ); return $ok;

tests.reference_solution: function wpbp_caching_005( int $post_id ): bool { _prime_post_caches( array( $post_id ), false, false ); clean_post_cache( $post_id ); return true; }

tests.prompt: Implement wpbp_caching_006() to get multiple salted cache values.
tests.expected_behavior: Reviewer contract: `wpbp_caching_006()` must get multiple salted cache values. Review focus: Use WordPress cache or transient APIs; Handle falsey values correctly. Static checks intentionally require wp_cache_get_multiple_salted. The runtime checks execute the function in WordPress and verify the observable return value or side effect.
requirements: Use WordPress cache or transient APIs

assertions.code: if ( ! function_exists( 'wpbp_caching_006' ) ) { return false; } return wpbp_caching_006();

tests.reference_solution: function wpbp_caching_006(): bool { wp_cache_set_salted( 'a', 'A', 'wpbp_multi_salt', 's' ); $out = wp_cache_get_multiple_salted( array( 'a', 'b' ), 'wpbp_multi_salt', 's' ); return isset( $out['a'] ) && 'A' === $out['a'] && array_key_exists( 'b', $out ) && false === $out['b']; }
